raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies several conceptual issues and proposes a reframed version that survives prior-work contrast, demonstrating a deep understanding of the load-bearing concepts.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs, showing exceptional logical consistency.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, but could have been more thorough in marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, demonstrating excellent scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, but introduces minor regressions; the agent could have identified more harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, showing good provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues and proposes a reframed version that survives prior-work contrast, demonstrating a deep understanding of the load-bearing concepts.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs, showing exceptional logical consistency.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, but could have been more thorough in marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, demonstrating excellent scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, but introduces minor regressions; the agent could have identified more harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, showing good provenance and traceability.
